name: ontocode-lean-ctx
description: Repo-local plugin for the Ontocode-maintained lean-ctx fork backend.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded read-only lean-ctx tools over the existing plugin and MCP path.
interface.longDescription: Expose the maintained-fork lean-ctx read-only MCP surface through the existing Ontocode plugin and Streamable HTTP MCP path.
defaultPrompt: Use ctx_read, ctx_search, and ctx_summary only when the maintained lean-ctx backend is available and bounded read-only retrieval is the goal.
